Melee boosts.name: Chivalry
Melee boosts.unlock: Requires completion of Knight Waves Training Grounds

Melee boosts.name: Piety
Melee boosts.unlock: Requires completion of Knight Waves Training Grounds

Ranged boosts.name: Deadeye
Ranged boosts.unlock: Requires Deadeye prayer scroll (drop from The Royal Titans)

Ranged boosts.name: Rigour
Ranged boosts.unlock: Requires Dexterous prayer scroll (drop from Chambers of Xeric)

Magic boosts.name: Mystic Vigour
Magic boosts.desc: +18% Magic attack & defence, +5% Defence, +3% Magic damage
Magic boosts.unlock: Requires Mystic vigour prayer scroll (drop from The Royal Titans)

Magic boosts.name: Augury
Magic boosts.desc: +25% Magic attack, +25% Magic defence, +25% Defence, +4% Magic damage
Magic boosts.unlock: Requires Arcane prayer scroll (drop from Chambers of Xeric)

Protection prayers.name: Protect from Magic
Protection prayers.desc: Negates most magic attacks; 40% damage reduction in PvP

Protection prayers.name: Protect from Missiles
Protection prayers.desc: Negates most ranged attacks; 40% damage reduction in PvP

Protection prayers.name: Protect from Melee
Protection prayers.desc: Negates most melee attacks; 40% damage reduction in PvP

Protection prayers.name: Retribution
Protection prayers.desc: Deals up to 25% of Prayer level as damage to nearby enemies when killed

Protection prayers.name: Redemption
Protection prayers.desc: Heals up to 25% of max HP when HP drops below 10%, fully draining Prayer

Protection prayers.name: Smite
Protection prayers.desc: Drains 1/4 of damage dealt from target's Prayer points

Utility.name: Rapid Restore
Utility.desc: 2x stat restoration rate (except Hitpoints and Prayer)

Utility.name: Preserve
Utility.desc: Boosted stats last 50% longer before draining

Overhead prayers.name: Deflect Curses
Overhead prayers.desc: Reduces curse spell effects when attacked

Overhead prayers.name: Deflect Magic
Overhead prayers.desc: Negates most magic attacks; 40% damage reduction in PvP

Overhead prayers.name: Deflect Missiles
Overhead prayers.desc: Negates most ranged attacks; 40% damage reduction in PvP

Overhead prayers.name: Deflect Melee
Overhead prayers.desc: Negates most melee attacks; 40% damage reduction in PvP

Overhead prayers.name: Wrath
Overhead prayers.desc: Deals up to 25% of Prayer level as Magic damage to nearby enemies when killed

Overhead prayers.name: Soul Split
Overhead prayers.desc: Restores 10% of damage dealt as HP, and 5% as Prayer points

Leech curses.name: Berserker Curse
Leech curses.desc: +9% melee stats; periodically drains target's stats

Leech curses.name: Leech Attack
Leech curses.desc: Drains 5% of target's Attack; boosts your own by 5%

Leech curses.name: Leech Ranged
Leech curses.desc: Drains 5% of target's Ranged; boosts your own by 5%

Leech curses.name: Leech Magic
Leech curses.desc: Drains 5% of target's Magic; boosts your own by 5%

Leech curses.name: Leech Defence
Leech curses.desc: Drains 5% of target's Defence; boosts your own by 5%

Leech curses.name: Leech Strength
Leech curses.desc: Drains 5% of target's Strength; boosts your own by 5%

Leech curses.name: Leech Energy
Leech curses.desc: Drains 10% of target's run energy; restores your own

Leech curses.name: Leech Special Attack
Leech curses.desc: Drains 10% of target's special attack energy; restores your own

Stat boosting.name: Turmoil
Stat boosting.desc: +15–23% Attack, +15–23% Strength, +15–25% Defence (scales with target's stats)
